title: Totally Not VR
description:
This is a remake of my survival project: "Care O' Metter" [itsucks].
With this modpack, you'll dive into an almost VR like experience.
body:
# Totally Not VR
**Not for those who got headache issue!!!**
## What Is This Modpacks?
This modpack aims to recreate a VR like experience **without** VR... Rework on early game survival, add new biomes, ... make gaming less addict cuz u will get headache :)
For More Check Patch Notes (not that much...) :<>
again...**Not for those who got headache issue!!!**
